pi_items.source: Inspection of the source file SampleDivesV2.ssrf confirms that the 7th dive recorded in the logbook actually has the dive number 87. There is no dive number 7 in the dataset.
Inspection of the source file SampleDivesV2.ssrf reveals that the 7th dive (dive number 87) at 'Yellow House' occurred on 2011-09-29. There are no dives recorded on 2011-09-04 in the dataset.
The setup_task.sh script explicitly downloads an image and saves it as starfish.jpg.
The setup_task.sh script explicitly saves the downloaded image to the path /home/ga/Pictures/starfish.jpg.

privileged_info_summary: The target image is named 'starfish.jpg' and is located at '/home/ga/Pictures/starfish.jpg'. However, the target dive number is actually 87 (which is the 7th sequential dive in the logbook), not 7. Additionally, the correct date for this dive at 'Yellow House' is 2011-09-29, contradicting the claimed date of 2011-09-04 which does not exist in the logbook data.
